---
title: "PuMP: FLASHBANG SQUIRREL"
mainfont: Special Elite
---

__BACKGROUND__ <br>
H

__PHYSICAL FEATURES__ <br>
__:__ 

__PERSONALITY QUIRKS__ <br>
__X but Y:__  <br>
__W yet Z:__ 

__FAVOURED GEAR__

- 
- 
- 

__PRIMAL STATS__ <br>
JAWS: | EYES:| LIMBS: | NERVES:

__PRIMAL ABILITIES__ <br>
__A:__ <br>
__B:__
